title: musa × kewensis
intro: Musa × kewensis, also known as the Kew male plant, is a sterile male plant of the banana family and a key parent in the production of many cultivated bananas. It is used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to stimulate appetite and improve digestion, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Musa × kewensis include its ability to aid in weight management, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Musa × kewensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
